sous_titres.text: You don't want to be late for your first day!
Don't bite your nails, you're 18. People will think you're uptight.
I hate this uniform. Why can't I wear trousers like the boys?
I love you. Have a good day.
Yeah, turn around. All the way around.
I can't let you get gobbled up by some poser clique.
Speaking Italian is discouraged on campus.
Welcome to St. Mary's International School in the heart of Milan.
Home of every rich kid and nepo baby.
-Um... -Oh, you don't have to. You're pretty.
I'm June, by the way. I don't know if I got your name.
I didn't give it to you.
Ignore Amelia, she's in a frisky mood today.
Oh, so, me and my mum just moved here.
-From London. -Dramarama at 10 o' clock. Don't look.
-What... What did you say? -Stay away from James Hunter.
Professor Beckett. Welcome to Humanities A1 Literature.
I'm Will, you're June, and I'm talking like a caveman.
I didn't know you were showing up.
James Hunter, not only are you late but now you are disrupting my class.
Leave Miss White alone and either find a seat...
Okay, fools, you know the drill. Pencils only.
You have... 30 minutes to finish the exam.
Oh, June. We're covering Othello, so I don't expect you to show...
"I know, Iago. Thy honesty and love doth mince this matter."
"Doubt that the stars are fire. Doubt that the sun doth move his aides."
"Doubt the truth to be a liar. But never doubt that I love."
-The Brit knows her Shakespeare. -That she does.
Chivalry is dead. You are my competition.
-So now I'm your competition. -It remains to be seen.
I wouldn't put it past me.
Oh! Oh my gosh, I'm so sorry.
-You did that on purpose, didn't you? -No, I... I was gesturing, and then you...
Are you saying it's my fault you can't even hold a cup of coffee?
It was an accident. You don't need to be rude about it.
What are you... I am not allowed in here!
Ciao. Hi, nice to meet you.
Oh my God... I'm so sorry. I saw your willy.
Alright, look, you've had your fun...
This is my first day here
and I don't want to get caught in the boys' locker room.
Is Snow White too much of a virgin to look at a pair of abs?
Or is she afraid to fall in love at first sight?
In love at first sight? With you? Hilarious.
I swear to God, if you keep going...
I want them washed and pressed by Monday.
Do I look like your maid?
Maybe a nice cold shower will change your mind.
Okay, okay... Okay, I'll do it.
You're already the most talked about girl at school.
Why? Because you were caught in the boys' locker room?
What's with all the anger? Is James on drugs?
If you need me, I'll be doing James' laundry.
You're not spending your first weekend here doing James' laundry.
Text me where to pick you up.
Blaze and I will come get you, and we don't take no for answers.
You've got to be kidding me.
We can always do it another time.
That's not going to work now, is it?
-One second. My daughter's back. -What's going on?
We're supposed to meet with a client tomorrow afternoon,
June said she could help out tomorrow afternoon.
She did it all the time back home.
Let me catch up with her and I'll call you back.
You're a lifesaver. I bet he pays well.
Happy to help? What's the catch?
Mmh... It's our first night here together.
It's technically our second. And I really want to go to this.
I am not paying you to tell me how your day went.
You are a rotten little girl, you know that?
You just love being in trouble, don't you?
So, this is from my mum's slutty phase after she got separated.
I'm pretty sure you're the same size.
-No, I don't want to be slutty. -Yes, you do.
I feel like my boobs are going to fall out.
Oh, and that's a bad thing?
-What is this place? -It's got a little bit of everything.
Thank you. You're cute when you do that.
It's a QR code that sends you to an app so you can bet on the fight.
Guys, I gotta go warm up the crowd, okay? You guys have fun!
-Who wants to bet? Okay... -Oh! Will! Will! Will!
Yeah, it was good, until I met your bestie.
Yeah. I heard about the shower.
He is so hilarious, trust me.
Trust me, you'll love him too.
No, I don't know about that.
Guys, are you ready or not?
So make some noise! Come on!
Tonight, you'll see an incredible fighter.
He's the guy! He's the guy!
Let's go! Go! Go! Come on!
You got this, bro! Punch him and move away!
Kick him, come on! Kick him!
-Come on! That's what I'm talking about! -My boy!
Success is hard work, sacrifice and love of what you're doing.
Not to mention the 10,000 euros I made!
To Austin, the best trainer around.
And Will, the best friend and sparring partner I could've ever asked for.
-I love you, bro. -I love you too, bro.
No, no, you go. I'll hang back.
You knocked him out in round one.
-I mean, is there anyone stopping you? -I'm just getting started.
With a bit more effort, that could be you in that ring.
-What's Snow White doing here? -She's with me.
I loved the way you kicked him, it was like...
I was looking for the recycling... Well, I don't mind.
Time to break out my superpower.
Because when I dance I feel like... a wanker.
I'm going to hit the bar. Do you want something?
She dumped him and fucked him up bad.
But don't worry about her, she's ancient history.
-Time to say goodnight. -Oh, good, you're leaving.
-What? You're throwing me out? -You catch on fast.
-What is your problem? -You are my problem.
Look... you clearly have some weird obsession with me.
Yes, I'm obsessed with getting rid of you and keeping you far away from Will.
Why? Why do you care? Who are you to tell me who I can date?
Why do you presume I give a damn about who you date?
You can get the whole school to fuck you, Snow White.
-Does Will know about this? -No, and he's not going to.
How am I supposed to get home?
Does the pillow have a name?
-I don't know about that, but... -Oh, sleepy.
No, no, don't go back to sleep. I want to know how your first day was.
Who's your new friend who lent you a 3,000-pound dress?
And why do you have a pile of boys' clothes?
Not to mention, who is that mysterious pillow you're snogging with?
You little shit! You've got to tell me everything!
You know, it's his birthday next Tuesday.
Isn't this supposed to get easier?
Right, I better get back to work.
Trophy, little trophy. Trophy, little trophy...
My name is August White and I'm so cool.
-All the ladies love me. -You are the definition of annoying.
You're future is bright, my brother.
And you lived in Gae Aulenti your whole life?
But you moved around a lot.
I travelled for MMA fighting, but I'm a lover, not a fighter.
What do you like to do?
I like to read thrillers and watch true crime TV.
I guess the dark turns me on.
No, I journal, but it's an outlet.
I write occasionally... about my moods.
-You don't strike me as moody. -Good, I fooled you.
Hey, man. Can I call you back?
I'm just out with... my mum. Yeah.
-"Mum"? -I'll tell her you say hi, yes.
Just curious why you told him I was your mum.
It's not worth getting into it with him.
He's been my best friend since we were kids and...
-He makes a bad first impression. -First, second...
Third... Yeah, they're all bad impressions.
When we first met in elementary school, I was afraid of James.
He wasn't scared of anyone, and I wanted to be like him.
You don't know how many times James has made me lose my temper.
He does it with everybody, but then he makes you fall in love with him.
Trust me, that would never happen.
Oh, I'm supposed to be babysitting this...
I should be back in about two hours.
So, Jasper, what would you like to do? Do you want to play a game?
Where the fuck is this kid?
Jasper lives here. This is Jasper's house.
God, this couldn't get any worse.
-Never seen a man's genitals before? -Of course I have.
Snow White, saying the Lord's name in vain again.
All that over a naked boy.
Do I want to pretend to shoot defenceless animals?
Yeah, it doesn't matter. The answer is no.
Nor do I think you should be teaching your brother.
Well, if I don't teach him, how's he going to learn?
What would you prefer, Snow White?
I was wondering when you were going to introduce sexism into the conversation.
We've been busy trying to find a special school for him.
He won't go to St. Mary's?
No, he has a mild form of autism so that might not be the best fit.
She had a breakdown over a year ago and she is in rehab.
She and I have not been together for years.
She has a new husband, but...
What do you think you're doing?
What gives you the right to talk about my mother to some strangers?
and you're not exactly the father of the year.
Could you be more specific, please?
Is that the same party you were talking about?
June, James can give you a ride.
-Don't you dare... -What's wrong with that boy?
Now go apologise. Then you can do whatever you want.
May I give you a ride to the party?
I'm not leaving for like an hour, but I'd be delighted to escort you.
What? Does Snow White mind the smoke?
You're the one that bothers me.
I don't know why you're angry at me.
Believe me, I would happily never talk to you again.
I get it, you like your girls mute,
so they don't challenge your narcissistic personality.
-It's called a motorcycle. -I know what a motorcycle is.
I'm not getting on that with you.
Is the little princess afraid of the bike?
Alright, I'll destroy him by round two.
What was that all about? Are you guys together?
Really? Because it looks like you were.
-It was nothing. -It doesn't look like nothing.
-I came from his house. -So, it's worse.
Do you want this? Maybe it's for you.
Wait, we don't have to queue?
-It doesn't look like vitamins. -Excuse me, who the fuck are you?
Sorry, I don't speak Italian. Only a little.
Hey, babe... Why are you in a rush?
-What is your problem, huh?! -Mind your own business.
The fuck are you doing?! What are you doing?! Leave him!
He went after Will. What did you expect me to do?
until you were in the fucking ring
for the fucking fight that is now fucking cancelled!
Do you have any idea how much money I had on this?
-I was doing it for Will. -I didn't ask for your help.
You were about to get your ass kicked.
-Someone had to defend her. -What did you say?
So, you are the reason for all of this?
Could you... Could you do me a favour
and get the fuck out of my face?
And then Jackson got involved. It was crazy.
I can't believe I missed all the fun.
It's not the best night. James is drunk.
I'm going to need some help with him.
The other side. The other side, bro.
Let's put him in the back.
-Where did you get the van? -My dad is the principal of the school.
Bring it back in one piece.
-You're not going to throw up, are you? -You know where my jacket is?
I'll get it. Be right back.
Have you always been this beautiful?
Plus, God knows what they're sticking into you with those needles.
How bad do you want to fuck me?
Sometimes you look at me that way.
The way you're looking at me now.
Give me that flask, Hunter. Give me!
If you tickle me again, I will bite your finger.
Nothing, I was checking he was still breathing.
Do you want to stay in the back or sit upfront with me?
I want to be with you.
-Do you need me to walk you inside? -I'll be fine.
-Did I do something wrong? -I don't know. Did you?
Look, I'm sorry for whatever has upset you,
but I'm not a mind reader.
So, either you talk to me or we can end this now.
This whole night has thrown me for a loop
ever since you showed up riding on James' bike with James.
I told you I was babysitting his brother.
Yes, but then there was the thing in the hall when Pietro was harassing you.
But I look like a total fucking loser that needs to be rescued by James.
I can fight my own battles. I don't need James every time.
What does that make me, a damsel in distress that needs to be saved?
-June, that's not what I meant. -That's exactly what you meant.
And as far as James is concerned, he's passed out in the back of your van.
I don't want to debate you.
-I'm sorry I fucked this whole thing up. -Yeah.
Watch your head. Are you okay?
Five minutes and I can start again.
I don't think we are there yet.
-Do you want me to walk you inside? -No, I'll be fine.
Fuck it! How could I do that?
Hey, what have you been up to?
I was waiting up for you. I must've fallen asleep.
I'm sorry about Jordan's older boy. I shouldn't put you in that situation.
According to Jordan, he's quite the mess.
Do me a favour and stay away from him. He gives me a bad feeling.
You've got nothing to worry about.
I have to go to Paris on Monday. Will you be alright on your own?
-Yeah, I'll be fine. I promise. -Sure? Okay. Thank you.
James Hunter continues to be a pig.
So what if Will came on himself, Will is perfect for me.
So, journal, can you please tell me why I'm so attracted to the piggy?
What the hell is wrong with me?
I can convince myself to love Will and hate James.
I must be strong, I must...
Oh my God, that was amazing.
Oh-oh. Someone's in a shitty mood today?
-We should not have done that. -Done what?
-You know exactly what. -I don't, I blacked out.
Then I saw this photo you sent me after your orgasm
and all the memories came back to me.
-Give me that photo! Give me! -No. No. Nope.
For the record, I faked it.
There's only one truth, Snow White.
Oh yeah, you think you're so cool, don't you?
I bet you're proud of yourself, stealing your best friend's girl.
Is that what you think I'm doing?
Listen to me, Snow White, very carefully.
Everything I do, I do for Will.
What makes you think it wasn't a test to see if you're worthy of him?
Is that all it was between us? A test?
The last thing he needs is a little girl fucking around with his head.
Sorry, you can't be in here.
What do you think you're doing?
If you touch me, I scream.
Well, I'm definitely gonna touch you.
And I'm almost positive you're going to scream.
Where are you going to touch me?
When are Taylor, Poppy and Tiffany coming back from their trip?
I've got the chance to make my money back.
Only problem is we can't use the club so we're going to go with the back-up.
We'll set up in that corner, over there.
-I think it was a bunker in World War II. -Oh.
Oh my God, you should have seen your face.
-Is it the same stuff? -Nope, that's better.
So, how much money is on the fight?
You're going to wish you were dead.
You're my bitch! You hear me?
You're having a reaction to the steroids.
Let me guess, your body itches, you're feeling nauseous.
Here, drink this. You need the electrolytes.
How could you know so much about this?
My brother was involved in steroids.
-I didn't know you had a brother. -Had.
It's not something I like to talk about.
-Hey! Hey! How many times... -He's having a reaction!
To whatever you doped him up with. What have you doped him up with?
Is it Trenbolone Acetate or Testosterone Cypionate?
You don't know! How fucking stupid are you?
What did you say? Say it again.
-Austin, chill. -She can't fucking talk to me that way.
-Give us a minute. -I'm not going anywhere.
Alright, I'll go get the car.
I think the feeling is mutual.
Oh. So, you think this is my fault?
He should be apologising, and you should be thanking me.
This whole macho thing is bullshit.
Will, let's go to dance. Come on!
I'll join you in a moment.
-Are you okay? -Yes, I'm okay. I'm okay.
Alright. Oh, have you seen June?
Anyways... See you on the dance floor!
Do you know what you're doing?
I've done this many times before.
It would be lower if you weren't touching me that way.
I don't want you to stop.
You don't have to stay with me.
Do you want me to leave?
Did you hear? Get out of the way. The party is over.
I'll follow you on his bike. Let's get him home so he's safe.
Take my bike to your place.
I'll pick it up as soon as I drop him off.
-Is he going to be okay? -I'll explain later.
I need to talk to you about James.
Tell me what he told you about me.
James is very, very important to me.
The last thing I need is for some cute piece of ass to come between us.
Now I can see why the boys are so enamoured with you.
May I come in for a moment?
I don't think that's... My mum is asleep.
I rang the doorbell, and no one answered.
Just keep this our little secret.
Hi, it's April. Please leave a message...
The police are on their way. You should leave.
Can I get my bike keys back?
Are you alright? Was it something I said?
What are you doing in that?
If I'm going to be your bodyguard, I have to dress the part.
You don't have to stay. I can fend for myself.
I can crash on the sofa.
Just don't try to take advantage of me in my sexy new robe.
Are you going to tell me what happened with Will tonight?
Are you going to tell me who threatened you?
-You really do care about him, don't you? -I care about a lot of things.
Tell me what happened with him tonight.
He's just going through some stuff.
What are you protecting him from?
-Yeah? -Well, they used to be a thing.
Will started getting too possessive and...
And Ari just broke things off.
He has just to stay off things that complicate his life.
-Does he know that you are doing this? -Hell no.
Everything I do, I do for Will.
He's like a brother to me.
-What do we have here? -What are you doing?
My turn to ask the questions.
Yeah, I still do, I'll have you know.
He was the one who taught me how to ride a motorbike.
One of his teammates introduced him to steroids
and I guess steroids turned into harder substances.
He must have been on something...
You'd think I'd stop getting so emotional over this.
June, I'm really sorry about your brother.
But the stuff Austin gives me...
He just wants me to perform at my maximum ability.
You've got to do what you've got to do.
You think everyone in this life wants to use you.
And I use them right back.
Everything in life is a negotiation.
Do you think friends, relationships... is all transactions?
-Love should be an unconditional feeling. -It should.
You're going in a dangerous direction.
As if you don't like danger.
Trust me, this is going to end badly.
After you destroyed Pietro, I can get you better fights.
We are going to make you a champ, J.
What happened with you and June last night?
Did she say something to you? I don't trust that bitch.
-J., come on! -You stay the fuck away from her.
Alright, take your hands off me.
I'm through with your fucking steroids.
You and I... we are done.
Come on, cool off and then we'll talk. J.!
Cool off and then we'll talk. J.!
J., cool off and then we'll talk!
Yeah, I thought it would go well with my Ferragamos.
Sorry, what? What did you say?
My dress for my birthday party.
Brian got them for me in Paris.
My dad's a professor and Brian's visiting him right now.
Oh, guys. Just... excuse me one minute.
Last night never happened. Got that?
Nothing did happen... Is everything okay?
-I can't do this with you. -You can't...
You can't... do what with me?
-How are you feeling? -Awesome. Last night was crazy.
Listen, I have to get to class, but...
Why don't I take you shopping this afternoon
and buy you a dress for Amelia's party?
I know I don't have to do that, but I want to.
I'm going to make you happy.
I know! I know! I know!
It's called a Dirty Little Virgin.
You can go and say hi to him. I am not threatened.
I don't want to say hi. I'm here with you.
I am borrowing her to dance.
No, I can't. My mum said I'm only allowed one.
Telling her you are staying over.
She's out of town. She won't... There's no point.
-Are you coming? -Yeah, I'll be there in a minute.
-You got eyes on the birthday girl? -She's with June, dancing.

I was keeping her from you to protect you from what happened with Ari.

-How did they get this? -How would I know?
That's so fucked up. How could you do this to Will?
Oh my God. I just saw.

Oh, please! Like you've got nothing to do with this!

These are photos of me! This is humiliating!
Who made that video? We've never even kissed.
Can I get you some medicine or water?
Thank you for taking care of me.
I'll crash in the guest room.
James, will you stay with me?
I don't want to be on my own.
I'll deal with her in the morning.
Are you going to talk to me?
How would you know that? You were drunk.

when everything that's come out of your mouth has been a lie?

I asked you to babysit his youngest son, not shag his eldest!
Great, let's hope I still have a career and we still have somewhere to live.
We'll be talking about this one for ages.
Do you mind if I take your phone and call a taxi?
-Do you want a water? -No, I'm good.
You promised to behave this year.

I have something to tell you.
You are the one guy that can take James fucking Hunter down.
Nobody will think you can win.
That's exactly why I'm putting all my money on you to come through.
I'm gonna pound him to the fucking ground.
And now I present to you with its debut...
This is all your fucking doing.
-I'm not going to fight him. -That's your fucking problem, baby boy.
If she thinks I fly economy, she can fuck herself.
You're not seriously showing your face here.
-Will! Stop the fight! -Get rid of her!
Take him out! Take him out! Fucking kill him!
What the fuck? No! No! Stay!
Please, leave the club, keep calm and follow the emergency.
Stay! Fucking stay! It's not over! My fucking money!
Attention, please evacuate the premises calmly.
Grab him before the police arrive.
Fuck off, June! What are you doing?
James would save you if the roles were reversed.
I thought you two were like brothers.
-What are we gonna do with him? -I don't know.
I don't want him talking to the police about our business.
Do you need me to call you an ambulance?
So, I guess this means we're good?
I love you too, James Hunter.
You guys need a moment? A room?
Yeah, I saved your fucking life, you prat.
To quote Shakespeare, "all's well that ends well".
We escaped death, Will forgave us,
and James and I may finally get to have our first kiss.
